message:
test(multi): add pure-logic unit tests for 6 packages

- scoring: sqrt (Newton's method), expandPath (tilde expansion)
- tutorial: clamp, abs, visibleLength (ANSI stripping)
- serve: matchTopic, sanitizeRequestID, isLoopbackHost,
  originAllowed, formatAge, safetyEscapeYAML{Single,Double}Quote
- cass: tokenize, isStopWord, removeCodeBlocks, normalizeScore,
  isSameProject, topicsOverlap, containsTopic,
  cleanContentForMarkdown, truncateToTokens, countInjectedItems
- clipboard: isWSL (6 cases), isWayland (6 cases)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
